changeSet.author: labsolution

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'EDAN H60S'

changeSet.comment: Map the full EDAN H60S panel (30 CBC+DIFF codes from 052 + PDW from 055) to the OE Test carrying each LOINC, mirroring the H99S map (052 cs3 + 055 cs2). The EXISTS-test guard keeps the same catalog dependency as 052/053; the NOT EXISTS-map guard makes it idempotent and skips the CBC-6 codes 053 already mapped (LIS-111).
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.analyzer_test_map (analyzer_id, analyzer_test_name, test_id, last_updated) SELECT a.id, v.code, (SELECT min(t.id) FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc), now() FROM clinlims.analyzer a CROSS JOIN (VALUES ('WBC', '6690-2'), ('RBC', '789-8'), ('HGB', '718-7'), ('HCT', '4544-3'), ('MCV', '787-2'), ('MCH', '785-6'), ('MCHC', '786-4'), ('PLT', '777-3'), ('RDW-CV', '788-0'), ('RDW_CV', '788-0'), ('MPV', '32623-1'), ('NEU#', '751-8'), ('NEU%', '770-8'), ('LYM#', '731-0'), ('LYM%', '736-9'), ('MON#', '742-7'), ('MON%', '5905-5'), ('EOS#', '711-2'), ('EOS%', '713-8'), ('BAS#', '704-7'), ('BAS%', '706-2'), ('NRBC#', '771-6'), ('NRBC%', '58413-6'), ('RDW-SD', '21000-5'), ('RDW_SD', '21000-5'), ('PCT', '51637-7'), ('IMG#', '53115-2'), ('IMG%', '38518-7'), ('RET#', '60474-4'), ('RET%', '17849-1'), ('PDW', '32207-3') ) AS v(code, loinc) WHERE a.name = 'EDAN H60S' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.analyzer_test_map m WHERE m.analyzer_id = a.id AND m.analyzer_test_name = v.code);

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.analyzer_test_map WHERE analyzer_test_name IN ( 'MCH', 'MCHC', 'RDW-CV', 'RDW_CV', 'MPV', 'NEU#', 'NEU%', 'LYM#', 'LYM%', 'MON#', 'MON%', 'EOS#', 'EOS%', 'BAS#', 'BAS%', 'NRBC#', 'NRBC%', 'RDW-SD', 'RDW_SD', 'PCT', 'IMG#', 'IMG%', 'RET#', 'RET%', 'PDW') AND analyzer_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'EDAN H60S');
